concept: Diversity / The Openness to Many Lights
description: The quality of having many different forms, types, ideas, etc. It is seen as a source of beauty, resilience, and collective wisdom.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'li' (light), 'no' (mind, thought), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'an openness to many lights/minds.' This frames diversity as a positive, receptive quality—the welcoming of multiple perspectives and forms of being.
